title: Mouse Extermination in Somers, NY | $350-$600 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination in Somers, Westchester. Licensed experts serving homes & businesses. Same-day service available. Call for $350-$600 mouse removal.
intro: Dealing with a mouse infestation in Somers, NY? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive mouse extermination services throughout Somers and Northern Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate mice from your home or business quickly and effectively.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Somers and Westchester County, we understand the unique pest challenges facing properties in this area. Our technicians are licensed, insured, and trained in the latest mouse exclusion techniques to ensure long-lasting results for your home or business.
localContext: Somers' mix of historic homes, modern developments near Heritage Hills, and properties surrounding Muscoot Reservoir creates ideal conditions for mouse activity, especially during colder months. From older homes near Somers Commons to estates along Route 202, we've helped countless Somers residents eliminate mouse problems and prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Somers typically ranges from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of entry points that need sealing. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Somers and Northern Westchester. Our team understands that mouse infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize emergency calls to get a technician to your property as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap placement, rodenticide application when necessary, exclusion work to seal entry points, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination of the mouse population.

faqs.question: Are mouse infestations common in Somers homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, mouse infestations are common in Somers, particularly in fall and winter when mice seek warmth and food indoors. The area's wooded surroundings, older home construction, and suburban setting create ideal conditions for mice to enter homes through small gaps in foundations, utility lines, and attic vents.
